name: slides
description: Create MARP slide decks and convert to PDF, HTML, PPTX, and Google Slides with visual validation. Ships two diagram-authoring skills: drawio (informal overlapping-shape sketches — Venn, block diagrams — via headless draw.io export) and typst-diagram (publication-quality figures with uniform-gap Venn layouts, triadic palette, reusable card/chip helpers, compiled via Typst).
